narration: I give Black Box sessions it has never seen. No labels. No handcrafted rubric. Just raw evidence. Its job is simple: find what matters, reject what doesn't, and return a grounded hypothesis.

setup_modifiers.narrative_center: multi-session intake — plural unseen sessions, no labels, no rubric, raw evidence only
setup_modifiers.plurality: two real sessions (boat_lidar + sanfer_tunnel) carried side-by-side through beats A-C
setup_modifiers.amber_discipline: ACCENT on hairlines / UNSEEN tag / final lockup underline; MUTED_AMBER for column eyebrows; MUTED_RED strip only on the silent /lidar_imu pill and negation strike-throughs
setup_modifiers.no_findings_reveal: beat C stops at artifact inventory — no RTK carr_soln analysis, no anomalies, no ranked hypotheses; only what the sessions carry
setup_modifiers.xfade: 0.40s smoothstep between beats (between block_02 0.35 and block_07 0.45)

beats.name: unseen sessions
beats.content: directory listing 'ls data/final_runs/' reveals two real intake folders: boat_lidar/ (USV · LIDAR-only · 7m) and sanfer_tunnel/ (Lincoln MKZ · RTK · 60m); UNSEEN tag with 'no prior labels'

beats.name: two sessions in
beats.content: two side-by-side session_manifest.json cards: boat_lidar (duration 6m 56s, USV LIDAR-only, /lidar_points + /lidar_imu, prior labels none, prior rubric none) and sanfer_tunnel (60m 26s, Lincoln MKZ RTK, u-blox · IMU · cameras, prior labels none, prior rubric none); 'two cases · unseen · no prior analysis' eyebrow

beats.name: raw evidence
beats.content: two-column raw-evidence layout. boat: pills for metadata.yaml, /lidar_points 4168 msgs, /lidar_imu 0 msgs (red strip, silent stream), bag_recovery_note. sanfer: 3 real dense-frame tiles (00000.0s, 01036.3s, 02072.5s) + pills for ublox_rover_navrelposned.csv, ublox_rover_navpvt.csv, diagnostics_nonzero_unique.csv. Footer 'raw artifacts · per session · nothing merged, nothing curated'

beats.name: negation + lockup
beats.content: 'no labels' and 'no handcrafted rubric' appear in STRIKE gray then get struck through in MUTED_RED with 'the system starts from raw evidence' dim subtitle; dissolves into final 'find what matters.' 96pt lockup with ACCENT underline + 'reject what doesn't · return a grounded hypothesis' + brand

source_assets_used: data/final_runs/boat_lidar/bundle/summary.json (case, duration_s=416.76, platform, sensor counts including /lidar_imu 0-msg silence)
text_overlays_used: real recordings handed in · not previously analyzed

edits_performed: PIL compositing of 4 beats at 30 fps, 435 frames total
beat A terminal-style `ls data/final_runs/` with staggered 2-row reveal (boat 0.7s, sanfer 1.2s)
beat B dual session_manifest.json cards revealed 0.15s / 0.55s apart; identical schema, different values
beat C two-column evidence view: boat pills only (LIDAR-only session has no cam frames); sanfer 3 real dense-frame thumbnails + RTK/diagnostics pills
red-strip treatment on /lidar_imu 0-msg pill to signal the silent stream (evidence, not a finding)
beat D strike-through on 'no labels' / 'no handcrafted rubric' then dissolve into 'find what matters.' lockup at t=12.5s
remaining_work: optional: if final edit wants boat represented with a LIDAR-pointcloud still instead of pills-only, generate one from /lidar_points via rosbags + matplotlib
optional: if VO lands earlier/later than 14.5s, compress/expand beat D hold (the easiest knob)
